component.name: Frontend Stack
component.description: sbomify's frontend dependency graph (bun.lock). Justifications for High advisories that cannot be cleared by a version bump.

vulnerabilities.description: serialize-javascript is vulnerable to RCE: RegExp.flags (and Date.prototype.toISOString) are interpolated into the output without escaping, so an attacker who controls an object passed to serialize() can inject JavaScript. Affected <= 7.0.2; fixed in 7.0.3.

analysis.detail: serialize-javascript is a build-time-only transitive dependency (vite-plugin-pwa -> workbox-build@7.4.0 -> @rollup/plugin-terser 0.4.x), used to serialize the terser minifier's worker options during `vite build`. It is not bundled into the production browser assets, so the vulnerable code is not present in the deployed artifact, and the build only serializes sbomify's own trusted terser configuration. @rollup/plugin-terser raised its serialize-javascript floor to ^7.0.3 in 1.0.0, but workbox-build@7.4.0 still pins the 0.4.x line; sbomify adopts the fix once workbox-build updates.
